headline: Trump рҹҚҠ AXES ICE Barbie рҹ‘ұвҖҚвҷҖпёҸрҹ’Һ Noem from Homeland CROWN рҹ‘‘рҹҡ«
text:
Trump рҹҚҠрҹ‘ЁвҖҚрҹ’ј the BIG DOG рҹҗ¶рҹ”Ҙ just CUT LOOSE рҹӘ“рҹ’Ҙ his ex-shining STAR вңЁ Kristi Noem рҹ‘©вҖҚрҹҰ°рҹҗҺ from DHS Homeland throne рҹ‘‘рҹҸ  after her DRAMA QUEEN рҹ‘‘рҹҳ© tenure went FULL MELTDOWN рҹ”Ҙрҹ’Ұ! No more outshining the BOSS MAN рҹҳӨвҖјпёҸ вҖ“ advisers in Trumpland рҹҸ°рҹҮәрҹҮё ALL learn the HARD RULE рҹ“ңрҹҡ«: NOBODY STEALS THE SPOTLIGHT рҹҢҹ from ORANGE DADDY рҹҚ‘рҹ‘‘!

Noem was POPPIN' OFF рҹ’Ҙ initially, strutting in BULLETPROOF VEST рҹӣЎпёҸрҹҳҺ with ICE RAID SQUAD рҹҡ”рҹ‘®вҖҚвҷӮпёҸ, hyping DEPORTATION DRIVE рҹӣ«рҹҡ« and SLAMMING Mexico border SHUT рҹ”’рҹҮІрҹҮҪ like a boss babe! Took her tough-girl act рҹҢҺвңҲпёҸ to El Salvador's CECOT mega-prison рҹҸ°рҹ”’, but OOOPSIE рҹӨҰвҖҚвҷҖпёҸ вҖ“ ROCKIN' a THICC $50K ROLEX рҹ’ҺвҢҡ on her wrist had LEFTY HATERS рҹҳЎ screeching 'ICE BARBIE рҹ‘ұвҖҚвҷҖпёҸрҹ§Ҡрҹ’…!' Horseback ads рҹҗҺрҹ“ә begging illegals to GTFO рҹҸҮрҹҡӘ? $220M FED BUCKS рҹ’°рҹ“Ҳ on HER FACE campaign + $200M LUXE JETS вңҲпёҸрҹ’ё? Dems in Congress рҹӨЎрҹ“ў BLASTED her SPENDING SPREE рҹӣ’рҹҳ©!

Trump DENIED knowin' deets рҹӨ·вҖҚвҷӮпёҸрҹҡ« to Reuters, straight-up CONTRADICTING Noem's Capitol Hill TEA вҳ•рҹ“ң вҖ“ 'I NEVER KNEW' рҹ’ҘрҹҳӨ! Had a SALTY AF рҹ“һ beef with her advisor Corey Lewandowski рҹӨқрҹҳ  (who's also BOUNCING рҹ‘Ӣ), then POLLED GOP SIMPS like Lindsey Graham рҹ§”вҖҚвҷӮпёҸрҹҳҸ ('TIME FOR CHANGE вҸ°рҹ”„!') and Dan Newhouse рҹ“Ј for the YEET рҹ’Ё verdict. Even sidelined her after MINNEAPOLIS MASSACRE рҹҳұрҹ’Ҙ вҖ“ agents popped TWO US citizens рҹ”«рҹ©ё (Renee Good & Alex Pretti), Noem SPUN BS рҹҢҖ 'domestic terrorism' рҹҡЁ with ZERO PROOF рҹӨҘ, so Trump YEETED border tsar Tom Homan рҹ§”рҹҡ« to fix her MESS рҹ§№!

Polls рҹ“Ҡрҹҳў show Americans DIG some immigration WINS рҹҘҮ but HATE the AGGRO TACTICS рҹҘҠрҹҡ” вҖ“ bad VIBES for GOP election szn рҹ—іпёҸрҹҳ¬, so Trump SNIPS her EARLY рҹҺӘвңӮпёҸ like a PRO wrestler cuttin' losses! First CABINET SHAKEUP рҹҢҖрҹ‘” in Term 2, unlike Term 1 TWEET-FIRING FIESTA рҹ“ұрҹ”Ҙрҹ’Ҙ circus. Noem DEMOTED to 'Shield of the Americas' envoy рҹӣЎпёҸрҹҢҺ gig вҖ“ THANKS Trump on Truth Social рҹ“ұрҹҷҸ while mid-SPEECH рҹҳі!

Enter REPLACEMENT HUNK: Oklahoma Sen Markwayne Mullin рҹ’ӘрҹҮәрҹҮё, Trump broski рҹӨқрҹ”Ҙ who's HARDLINE AF on borders рҹҡ«, calls feds 'PATRIOTS рҹҰ…вқӨпёҸ' dodgin' death threats вҡ пёҸ, and ROASTS Dems over DHS shutdown drama рҹҡ«рҹ’°. Will it FLIP policy? Mullin = Noem 2.0 but LESS BARBIE, MORE BRUTE рҹҘҠрҹҳҲ? Noem's the FIRST HIGH-PROFILE CASUALTY вҡ°пёҸрҹ’Ҙ but Trump stays READY to PURGE рҹҡ«рҹ‘‘ if winds shift рҹҢ¬пёҸ вҖ“ KING reads the room like a BOSS рҹ•өпёҸвҖҚвҷӮпёҸрҹҚҠ! Wall Street cucks рҹӨ‘рҹ“ү watchin' Trump ADMIN ORGY рҹ’Ұрҹ‘ҜвҖҚвҷӮпёҸ evolve, no more Noem STEALING SCREEN TIME рҹ“әрҹҡ«! рҹҳӮрҹ”ҘрҹҚ‘
